title: Greenhouses
description: Build glass greenhouses to grow biome-specific plants, spawn mobs, and generate unique blocks on your island.
body:
# 🌱 Greenhouses — Biomes in a Box

Let players build glass greenhouses on their island to recreate biomes. Each greenhouse generates biome-specific resources — grow jungle trees in a desert, spawn snow in the tropics, or breed biome-specific mobs.

## Features

- **Biome greenhouses** — glass structures that simulate specific biomes
- **Resource generation** — greenhouses produce biome-specific blocks, plants, and mobs over time
- **Recipe system** — each biome requires specific blocks inside the greenhouse
- **Snowfall and ice** — cold biome greenhouses generate snow and ice
- **Mob spawning** — biome-appropriate mobs can spawn inside
- **Works with all BentoBox game modes**

A unique feature that gives players creative control over their island ecology.

📦 Requires [BentoBox](https://modrinth.com/plugin/bentobox) + a game mode addon.
